<content>1: /**
2:  * ProseMirror editor setup for collaborative document editing.
3:  * Uses prosemirror-example-setup for baseline functionality.
4:  * 
5:  * Supports multiple content modes:
6:  * - "rich" / "markdown" / "plain" - Full editor with toolbar
7:  * - "raw" - Minimal editor for code/config (no toolbar, no formatting shortcuts)
8:  * - "media" / "binary" - Not editable (handled elsewhere)
9:  */
10: 
11: import { EditorState, type Transaction, type Plugin, TextSelection } from 'prosemirror-state';
12: import { EditorView } from 'prosemirror-view';
13: import { Schema, DOMParser, Node } from 'prosemirror-model';
14: import { schema as basicSchema } from 'prosemirror-schema-basic';
15: import { addListNodes } from 'prosemirror-schema-list';
16: import { exampleSetup, buildMenuItems } from 'prosemirror-example-setup';
17: import { collab, sendableSteps, getVersion } from 'prosemirror-collab';
18: import { keymap } from 'prosemirror-keymap';
19: import { baseKeymap } from 'prosemirror-commands';
20: import { history } from 'prosemirror-history';
21: import { dropCursor } from 'prosemirror-dropcursor';
22: import { gapCursor } from 'prosemirror-gapcursor';
23: import { undoItem, redoItem, blockTypeItem, icons } from 'prosemirror-menu';
24: import { createCursorPlugin, type SendCursorFn } from './cursors';
25: 
26: /**
27:  * Content mode types matching server-side enum.
28:  * Determines how the editor is configured.
29:  */
30: export type ContentMode = 'rich' | 'markdown' | 'plain' | 'raw' | 'media' | 'binary';
31: 
32: /**
33:  * Full schema with list support for rich/markdown/plain modes.
34:  */
35: export const richSchema = new Schema({
36:   nodes: addListNodes(basicSchema.spec.nodes, 'paragraph block*', 'block'),
37:   marks: basicSchema.spec.marks,
38: });
39: 
40: /**
41:  * Minimal schema for raw mode (code/config files).
42:  * Only allows doc containing code_block nodes with text.
43:  * No marks (formatting) allowed.
44:  */
45: export const rawSchema = new Schema({
46:   nodes: {
47:     doc: { content: 'code_block+' },
48:     text: { group: 'inline' },
49:     code_block: {
50:       content: 'text*',
51:       marks: '',
52:       group: 'block',
53:       code: true,
54:       defining: true,
55:       parseDOM: [{ tag: 'pre', preserveWhitespace: 'full' }],
56:       toDOM() { return ['pre', ['code', 0]]; },
57:     },
58:   },
59:   marks: {},
60: });
